commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a9dc0f988c4ed36a9175fe6387296ec3aa11e959)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Feishu drive list cursor inputs, scoped info lookup, optional `all` pagination, and mocked regression tests for list/info pagination.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +213. Total +268 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main and v2026.6.8 call `drive.file.list` only once for the affected list/info paths, while the SDK returns `has_more` and `next_page_token`. I did not run a live Feishu tenant with a multi-page folder in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because contributor live proof, the `all` API-load decision, and the sibling PR lane choice cannot be settled by an automated repair alone.

target.title: fix(feishu): add pagination support for drive list and info
target.body:
## Summary

Feishu drive list/info missing pagination support

## Changes

- `extensions/feishu/src/drive-schema.ts`: Add page_size, page_token, and all parameters
- `extensions/feishu/src/drive.ts`: Add pagination loop for listFolder and getFileInfo

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Feishu drive list and info actions lacked pagination, failing when folders contain more than 10 items.

Real environment tested: ubuntu-24.04, Node 24, branch fix/issue-93928-feishu-drive-pagination.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
npx tsx -e '
(async () => {
const { FeishuDriveSchema } = await import("./extensions/feishu/src/drive-schema.ts");
for (const s of (FeishuDriveSchema?.anyOf || [])) {
  const p = s?.properties || {};
  if (p.page_size) console.log("page_size: ✅  page_token: ✅  all: " + (p.all ? "✅" : "❌"));
}
})();
'
```

Evidence after fix:

```text
$ npx tsx -e '...'
page_size: ✅  page_token: ✅  all: ✅
page_size: ✅  page_token: ✅  all: ❌
page_size: ✅  page_token: ✅  all: ❌

Pagination params verified in FeishuDriveSchema: ✅
```

The tool input schemas now accept `page_size`, `page_token`, and `all` (list only) parameters. The `listFolder` implementation loops via `has_more + page_token` when `all: true`, matching the existing pattern from `monitor.comment.ts:437-440`.

Tests (19 passed):

```text
$ node scripts/test-projects.mjs extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  19 passed (19)
```

Observed result after fix: Pagination parameters are accepted by the schema and drive functions. When `all: true`, the list loops until `has_more` is false. When omitted (default), single page is returned with continuation metadata.

What was not tested: End-to-end with a real Feishu tenant with >10 items in a folder.

Closes: #93928
target.author: ajwan8998

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
